name: first-match-wins
note: 'shared' matches both rules; the engine takes the first, routing to cloud (not edge).

name: later-rule-when-earlier-misses
note: 'only2' matches just the second rule; the first is skipped, so it routes to edge.

name: fail-open-to-default
note: No rule matches, so the request falls open to default_model (local).
